protocol.classifier: predeclared fold-local probe recipes; see recipes field
protocol.convergence_policy: fail the run on any scikit-learn ConvergenceWarning

public_export.note: The full raw result remains local because the GitHub repository is public.

anatomy_6class_strict.definition: Pure M1/M2/M3/M4 plus single-territory ACA/PCA; exclude composites.

clean_m2_m3.definition: Pure M2 vs pure M3; exclude every composite and non-M2/M3 label.

m2_m3_pca_strict.definition: Pure M2 vs pure M3 vs PCA; exclude ACA, M1/M4, and every composite label.

mca_4class_strict.definition: Pure single-segment MCA labels M1/M2/M3/M4; sparse-class stress test.

mca_coarse_strict.definition: Pure M2 vs pure M3 vs pure M1/M4 grouped as other-MCA; diagnostic only.

supported_4class.definition: M2 vs M3 vs ACA vs PCA; exclude M1/M4 and cross/within-MCA composites.

territory_strict.definition: MCA vs ACA vs PCA; exclude labels spanning more than one territory.
